programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory turns to Alex for some advice when she begins to fear she'll lose her new boyfriend unless she agrees to his pleas for a more "adult" romance.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex courts disaster when he invites two dates to the senior prom. He devises an elaborate scheme for escorting each of the unknowing girls on a night to remember.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse is excited at the prospect of reviving her folk-singing career at a local nightclub.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is so sure that he will be named valedictorian of his class that he can't cope with the thought of being defeated by a girl-especially his girl.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: In the hospital awaiting a tonsillectomy, Jennifer fears she may never see her family again.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse feels the need to expand her horizons.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: The news that their mother is pregnant sends the three Keaton kids into an angry outburst resulting in a family battle.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex befriends Donna, a young, unwed expectant mother from Elyse's natural-childbirth class.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory is crushed when her favorite aunt dies suddenly, but her feelings of sadness turn to anger when family and friends at the funeral seem to be taking Aunt Trudy's death too lightly.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: To help Steven during pledge week at the television station, the Keatons reluctantly agree to be part of the entertainment. The audience gets an unexpected show when Elyse goes into labor right on camera while in the middle of a song.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A snowstorm prevents Elyse from getting to the hospital in time to deliver her baby.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jennifer is jealous of the attention paid to Andrew.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex and his good friend James go into business together as tutors for their fellow students at Leland.

programme.title: Pokerstars Big Game on Tour
programme.desc: The high stakes cash game continues in Las Vegas, with $1,000,000 on the table. The Keating-Veldhuis rivalry is reaching boiling point, while Loose Cannon Luke Moy faces the ultimate test.

programme.title: Pokerstars Big Game on Tour
programme.desc: As a new player joins the table, the chip-swinging contest between Alan Keating and Lex Veldhuis shows no signs of stopping. The Loose Cannon tries to cling onto his profit, while comedian Morgan Jay aims to claw his way back from a $60,000 loss.

programme.title: Pokerstars Big Game on Tour
programme.desc: More high stakes Hold'em from Las Vegas. Alan Keating's unorthodox style leaves comedian Morgan Jay lost for lyrics, while Loose Cannon Luke attempts a bold bluff for tens of thousands of dollars.

programme.title: Coaches' Corner
programme.desc: Three former U.S. Men's National Team head coaches join host Rob Stone to break down the World Cup through the eyes of the men who've actually made the toughest decisions on soccer's biggest stage.

programme.title: eBasketball: H2H GG League
programme.desc: Coverage of top eBasketball gamers competing head-to-head in competitive matchups.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help an alcoholic, womanizing actor (who plays an angel on television) and the young boy who idolizes him realize the true purpose of God's messengers.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels help a seemingly perfect family when a teenager learns a damaging secret about his father.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Progress comes to Colorado Springs, and Sully pays the price.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Cheyenne medicine man Cloud Dancing is wounded by General Custer, who intends to hang him, Sully and Dr. Mike join forces to help him escape.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: As Dr. Mike's birthday approaches, the kids decide to do something about her unmarried status

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Matthew and Michaela are at odds over his future when he sets out to prove to others -- and to himself -- that he's a grown man ready to take on life -- and decides to marry Ingrid.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Influenced by the pulp romance novels she loves, Colleen develops her first crush -- on Sully -- and schemes a way for him to rescue her from danger.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike faces the most difficult challenge of her career when she is forced to operate on Brian after he suffers a brain injury.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike discovers Hank's dark secret -- an illegitimate son.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A famous civil war photographer realizes he may be taking his last picture after Dr. Mike discovers that he is going blind.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike breaks the rules to enter her new horse in an important race.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike must prove that Loren’s sister-in-law did not murder her abusive husband.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A dead man walks when Halloween comes to Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Jake is accused of killing a Cheyenne brave, and the incident disrupts the town, as well as the friendship between Sully and Cloud Dancing.

programme.title: Kickboxer 4: The Aggressor
programme.desc: David Sloan is on a mission to free his wife who has been enslaved by an evil world champion, Tong Po. He attempts to gain entry into Po’s savage kingdom by fighting in the tournament of champions where the winner takes all.

programme.title: Kickboxer 5: Redemption
programme.desc: A retired kickboxer goes on a mission to avenge the brutal death of his promising young student. Revenge is not easy, however, as the target of his wrath is a leader of an underworld kickboxing league.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Vengeance
programme.desc: A man seeks revenge against a brutal martial-arts fighter.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Retaliation
programme.desc: When MMA fighter Kurt Sloane is forced into an underground death match with a 400lb drug-enhanced killer, he seeks help from the legendary Master Durand (Jean-Claude Van Damme) and prison fighter Briggs (Mike Tyson) to survive the fight.

programme.title: The Last Dragon
programme.desc: An enjoyable pastiche of martial arts, romance, music, and video, THE LAST DRAGON presents a likable hero, Leroy, who aspires to become a kung fu master. Though black and living in Harlem with his family, Leroy lives like a Chinese. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Clash
programme.desc: Trinh, a mercenary, must complete a series of organized crime jobs for her boss in order to win the release of her kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Furie
programme.desc: When a little girl is kidnapped by a trafficking ring, they soon find they messed with the wrong child. Her mother, a notorious former gang leader, is close on their trail and will go to any lengths to bring her daughter home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue — a flaw on a mailing envelope — exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother, Barbara Mullenix, in 2006. She allegedly packed her mother's bloodied corpse in a cardboard box before dumping it in California's Newport Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family were executed in their own home. For three years, the murders went unsolved. Finally, a 30-year-old box of ammunition and some fluorescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen received threatening emails and then disappeared. Tracking the source of the emails led police to the home of Daphne Wright, where they believe a murder was committed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Susan Fassett was gunned down as she left her church choir practice in Poughkeepsie, NY. After clearing her husband, police turned their attention to Fred Andros, with whom Susan had an affair.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Kristine Fitzhugh failed to show up for her music class, her husband found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home. Further investigation reveals evidence of murder in the kitchen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the "Last Call Killer" because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This killer probably hoped to cover his tracks by staging the crime scene. But investigators saw through the attempt almost immediately and turned to forensic science to learn what really happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovers the body of a young woman. She had been beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped. Nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Alien Rangers
programme.desc: The young Rangers search for their pieces of the Zeo Crystal to recover their powers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Alien Rangers
programme.desc: In the distant past, Adam searches across Korea for his Zeo Crystal.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Alien Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy and Katherine continue their search for their individual Zeo Crystals.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Alien Rangers
programme.desc: Zedd and Rita send the Hydro Hog to Earth to suck up all the water.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Alien Rangers
programme.desc: Aisha faces a difficult decision in her Zeo Quest while the Alien Rangers battle Hydro Hog.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Tommy team up to teach a self-defense class to middle-aged women. Bulk and Skull join the class -- thinking that it will be an opportunity to meet "babes."

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Bulk and Skull make a nuisance of themselves by attempting to juggle balls at a party for a group of kids, but Zack manages to scare them off with a pair of rubber snakes. An impressed Angela gives Zack a peck on the cheek.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is a contestant with a chance to win a car on a tacky horror comedy game show called Trick or Treat. Her opponent is none other than Skull.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Zack try to help young Roger make Ernie's junior soccer team. The eavesdropping Rita commands the creation of a monster to kick around the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Tommy volunteer their time at the Youth Center to teach a Karate class to kids. Their teamwork gives Rita the idea for her latest monster, the "Slippery Shark.”

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly helps her insecure younger cousin Kelly try out for the Angel Grove Junior High cheerleading team. Kelly, however, feels that she cannot measure up to her beautiful talented cousin, who is still remembered for being an outstanding cheerleader.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy decides to try out for football but is afraid that he won’t be any good at it since he has never played football before. Ernie, a former football player himself, agrees to help Tommy train at the Juice Bar for his football tryout.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lately, Tommy has been having trouble remembering things. When Mrs. Appleby gives her class an assignment that requires the students to change their biggest faults, the teens decide to help Tommy deal with his forgetfulness.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: As Angela's birthday approaches, Zack would like to win her affections again by buying her a pair of pearl earrings.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita Repulsa's minions abandon her when an even more evil menace arrives at the Moon.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd steals the power of the Zords away from the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers obtain new Zords to defeat Piranhtis Head.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd attacks with a monster that can morph from one Power Ranger into another.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd casts a spell on the Power Rangers.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Este era un solitario que esparció el terror a través del correo por dieciocho años. Dos hombres murieron y más de una docena salieron heridos, pero Ted Kaczinsky no recibió su sobrenombre del "Unabomber".

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El Alabama, un par de criminales condenados escaparon de la custodia de un oficial local y huyeron a lo largo del país. Mientras huían de las autoridades, fueron de estado en estado y desataron una ola de secuestros y robos de autos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Comenzando en California en 1995, un asesino en serie atacó a varias mujeres vulnerables. Al principio, se mostraba encantador y generoso, y con rapidez se tornaba violento. Era despiadado en sus crímenes y rápido en sus escapes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 3 de febrero de 1990, una niña huyó de la casa de su madre y desapareció sin dejar rastro. Su madre esperaba que la policía de Pasadena, en Texas, pudiera encontrarla antes de que fuera muy tarde.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En agosto de 1984, el hijo de un constructor exitoso de bienes raíces fue secuestrado en frente del negocio de su padre en Miami. Después de que el padre recibió la exigencia de un rescate de tres millones de dólares, el FBI se involucró.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los años ochenta, la decapitación de un joven afroamericano llevó al Departamento de Policía de Miami-Dade y al FBI a lo largo de un rastro de asesinatos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un cuerpo en llamas en un callejón oscuro arroja luz sobre un asesino. Sus compañeros en el crimen contarían la historia, si hubieran sobrevivido.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El 12 de febrero de 1997, dos hombres usaron una almádena para entrar en una casa de Camden, Nueva Jersey, y uno de los intrusos resultó herido cuando el propietario les disparó mientras intentaban escapar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1980, el FBI comenzó una extensa búsqueda de operación encubierta, de nombre en código "Safebet", que fue diseñada para exponer la infiltración de la mafia de Chicago en los alrededores de los suburbios de la ciudad.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1994, una inmigrante adolescente fue a los Estados Unidos para cumplir su sueño de convertirse en doctora. Pero un giro trágico del destino intervino cuando se convirtió en una víctima inocente del comercio de las drogas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los 90, la policía de Washington D. C. estaba perdiendo la batalla contra las bandas callejeras que habían fortalecido sus territorios con gran violencia.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A las nueve y treinta de la mañana del 30 de enero de 1997, la policía de Richmond, Virginia, respondió a un reporte de disparos en un banco local.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Memphis, Tennessee, un horrible crimen dejó aterrados a los residentes de la zona. Cuando una madre joven y acaudalada fue secuestrada frente a la casa de sus suegros, la policía tenía muchos sospechosos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The probe of a woman's attempt on her husband's life leads to a fertility doctor with a high rate of success.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After learning controversial therapy may have caused an autistic's death, McCoy must discredit the main witness.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a fellow detective and childhood friend forces Logan to deal with repressed memories about the school he attended.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigations of seemingly unrelated murders of a cab driver and a hit man lead Briscoe and Logan to the cabbie's wife.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives arrest the father of a woman with multiple personalities for the murder of a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A newly elected, gay councilman's companion and his ousted opponent are suspects in the politician's murder.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When Briscoe and Curtis capture a couple after a violent crime spree, the woman claims she was forced to commit the crimes against her will.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: The Good Father: The Martin MacNeill Story
programme.desc: Weeks after his wife's suspicious death, Dr. Martin MacNeill moves in his mistress under the guise of a live-in nanny. Shocked by her father's actions, his daughter begins to question everything she's known about him while uncovering a web of lies.

programme.title: Surviving My Father: The Rachel Jeffs Story
programme.desc: Warren Jeffs becomes the notorious leader of a polygamous sect known as the FLDS Church. Subjected to her father's abuse and manipulation, Rachel Jeffs plans a daring escape from the heavily guarded community, then returns to rescue her children.

programme.title: Victoria Gotti: My Father's Daughter
programme.desc: Delving into the tumultuous world of Victoria Gotti and her life as the daughter of mob boss John Gotti.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: Escaping the NXIVM Cult With Gretchen Carlson
programme.desc: The purported self-help group NXIVM traps thousands and targets the minds and bodies of young women from around the country; actress Catherine Oxenberg shares her personal fight to get her daughter out of the outrageous cult.

programme.desc: Laura finds a bottle bearing a message floating downstream, then another containing an infant's picture.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.desc: Caroline and Charles are devastated when they find out that Mary's sight is deteriorating and cannot bear to tell her the truth.

programme.desc: Charles and Jonathan become increasingly unhappy with Winoka; guest Ray Bolger.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Shocked at Walnut Grove's condition, the returning Ingalls, Garveys and Olesons try to convince the founder (Karl Swenson) it can be saved.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about “on” and “off” by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: With a little Barney magic, the children experience the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Drama erupts at Kirk and Rasheeda's seminar. Ty questions Mimi's relationship with Stevie. The mothers of Joc's children weigh in on Kendra. Pooh and Akbar link up to take down Shekinah. Scrapp debates his next move with Sierra.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Kendra gets wind of the scandalous rumors about Joc. Insensitive comments spark an emotional argument between Spice and Shekinah. Tokyo goes missing. Scrapp struggles to break the cycle. Akbar finds common ground with an unlikely ally.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Karlie and her daughter collide with Pooh and her daughter at Rasheeda's event. Joc digs himself a deeper hole with Kendra. Scrappy struggles after a disastrous family get-together. Tokyo opens up to her mom about her personal struggles.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Mimi and Faith get caught up in Stevie and Ty's beef. Joc plots a happy ending with Kendra. Scrappy comes to terms with his car accident. Pooh and Sierra collide at Spice and Akbar's session. Karlie arrives at a crossroads on her fertility journey.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: On part 1 of the Reunion, the cast gets together with host Nina Parker to wrap up a season filled with drama. We get the real on relationships, co-parenting, and even throw a little "Pooh" on the fire.The night is buttoned up with a lie detector test

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta

programme.title: Queen of Atlanta

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.desc: Ben returns the defendant, but a crucial witness (the only witness) disappears. Tyler discovers a drug scheme, Charlene finds out about the background, and Ben figures out the pieces of the puzzle. Ben even learns about the Army.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: The senseless murder of a toy store owner not only clouds the Christmas spirit, but threatens an annual party and gifts of toys to local orphans.

programme.desc: When blackmail leads to murder, the evidence leads straight to Ben’s old reporter friend. With a client who’s not talking, even Ben is starting to have his doubts. While everyone thinks she is guilty, Ben must work hard to prove his friend’s innocence.

programme.desc: While rescuing an imprisoned patriot, Barney is critically wounded and must be left behind in order for the IMF to complete their mission in the "Hunted" episode of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.desc: Phelps poses as an archeology professor and Dana as one of his graduate students, as the IMF goes to the aid of a group of young guerilla fighters in an effort to obtain from them a notebook containing vital scientific information in "The Rebel"

programme.desc: A political boss hires a professional provocateur to stage a violent protest, in a maneuver to discredit his state's governor and elevate his puppet, the mayor, to the governorship in "Takeover"

programme.desc: Hari Rhodes guest stars as George Corley, an underworld leader whose link with a police precinct chief is the object of Barney's brother's newspaper crusade in "Cat's Paw"

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the Colonial Williamsburg Millinery Shop, Mister Rogers wears 18th century clothing. Mayor Maggie informs King Friday that those in Westwood are planning to take off their three-cornered hats.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a toy crane. When he lifts objects slowly, the crane works perfectly. Neighbor Aber and Corney use a crane to catch the Trolley. Trolley's controls are adjusted back to normal.

programme.desc: Sanji tries to fight his way off a most peculiar island, but his frilly battle costume threatens to awaken his inner maiden. Elsewhere, Chopper tries to avoid being served in a hot pot!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico Robin lends her many hands to an overmatched gang of revolutionaries in a frigid land of eternal suffering, and Usopp bulks up to avoid becoming a snack for a hungry, hungry island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro's attempt to reunite with his friends leads him to a massive tomb and a host of shadowy swordsmen. Elsewhere, Brook uses his status as Satan to get an eyeful of undergarments!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the marines prepare for Ace's execution, Luffy looks back on all the good times he shared with his brother, and Jimbei reveals the shocking details of the day Fire Fist Ace went down in defeat!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang continue on their way to Marineford, but once he arrives, the rubber-man must defeat both Navy Admirals and Warlords of the Sea before he can save Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Citizens and soldiers alike prepare for all-out war as Ace is led to the site of his execution. While the world watches, the true identity of the condemned man's father is shockingly revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Flashbacks reveal the agonizing sacrifice made by Ace's mother in order save his life – and the secret behind his connection to Luffy. Back in the present, Whitebeard makes an unexpected entrance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As a massive seaquake rocks Marineford, Ace recalls the ups and downs of his life as a pirate, including his first encounter with Whitebeard – and the unthinkable betrayal that led to his capture!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard begins his attack with a tsunami-spawning sea quake, but the marines counter with a blast of frigid air that turns the tidal wave into an iceberg! Will Luffy and his crew arrive in time to join the battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fire meets ice as mythical warriors, erupting admirals, legendary pirates, and a giant giant go head to head in the biggest, baddest battle of all time! There's only one thing missing: Monkey D. Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A towering giant of a giant known as Little Oars Jr. carves a path of death and destruction as he fights to save Ace. The monstrous mauler is within arm's reach of his friend when he's intercepted by the seven warlords of the sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the wake of Little Oars Junior's tragic defeat, Admiral Sengoku hatches a devious plan to speed up the countdown to Ace's execution. The situation looks beyond bleak until a hero enters the fray from on high!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy appears on the field of battle with a ferocious sense of urgency. Ace could be executed at any minute, and the rubber-man's refusal to back down impresses even the most feared men in all the world!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy leaps into action, attacking the Naval forces with a frantic display of brutality. Meanwhile, Ace watches in horror as an army of zombies rises up to attack his brother!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Supernatural powers take center stage in the battle to save Ace as Luffy and his uniquely talented allies throw down with the Navy's own arsenal of Devil Fruit Eaters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A gift from Boa Hancock and Ivan-san's Galaxy Wink get Luffy closer to Ace than ever, but a sword-wielding foe from the past threatens to derail the rescue mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy runs into a lethal roadblock in the form of Hawk-Eye Mihawk. The legendary swordsman is determined to halt Luffy's onslaught, but Ivan-san, Boa Hancock, and Jimbei aren't ready to give up the fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his pirate brethren have their hands full with an ominous army of unbeatable Kumas! While the inhuman minions march onward, Whitebeard encounters a former ally!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard is betrayed – and brutally stabbed – by one of his own men! In the wake of this unthinkable act of treason, allegations about the legendary pirate bring the battle to a halt!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard shrugs off his injuries and leads a ferocious charge into the heart of the enemy's defenses, but three deadly Admirals join forces to silence his shock wave attack as the pirates find themselves surrounded by impenetrable walls!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the ice melting beneath his feet, Luffy begins a desperate final charge towards his soon-to-be-executed brother. Should his rescue attempt fail, death will surely embrace them both!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile's unexpected assistance creates an opening for Luffy to advance, and Whitebeard has a surprise lurking beneath the ice that might swing the momentum in favor of the pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle rages on and the bodies pile up as Whitebeard squares off against an Admiral, Luffy gets knocked cold, and the legendary Vice-Admiral Garp finally enters the fray!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While awaiting his execution, Ace flashes back to a troubled youth seeking the truth about his father. Meanwhile, Luffy begs Ivan for a potentially-deadly treatment that will allow him to continue fighting!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard struggles to withstand the full force of the Marine onslaught. With the executioner's swords hovering above Ace's head, Straw Hat Luffy discovers a new ability!

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The fatal shooting of a well-known San Antonio rapper puts the community on high alert as police take part in a manhunt to track down the killer; as they piece together the evidence, witnesses point the finger at a scorned lover fueled by rage.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A woman pursuing her dreams is found drugged in her home; across New York, another person with similar symptoms comes forward, and authorities connect the cases, exposing an international fugitive with a ruthless pattern.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When an Arkansas family man is shot to death in his home, his widow is quick to point the blame around town; detectives tail the suspects, a torrid affair and deadly secret come to light, revealing a manipulative wolf in sheep's clothing.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A frantic Ohio woman seeks refuge in a fast-food restaurant after escaping from a deadly assault; police sort through contradicting stories to expose a habitual criminal.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a devoted husband and father is found shot to death on his bathroom floor, the case is quickly ruled a homicide; a key witness starts changing their story, detectives must determine if this was an act of self-defense or premeditated murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Wild West reenactor is found dead in his private Arizona ranch; police race to find the killer of the beloved showman; as investigators connect the dots, they realize the cold-blooded mastermind is lurking close to home.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When the spouse of a high-profile defense attorney is found dead in their Arkansas home, police theorize if a disgruntled client could be to blame; the investigation exposes an obsessive admirer with a delusional motive to murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a routine welfare check, Albuquerque police discover a beloved teacher has vanished; as investigators dive into her family history, they uncover a shocking murder plot driven by vengeance and jealousy.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After an Oregon wife's failed suicide attempt results in her husband's death, the cracks in a seemingly perfect marriage are brought to light; the investigation uncovers if his inadvertent death is truly an accident or a deadly cover-up.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Georgia woman who is brutally stabbed provides police with a suspect's name before succumbing to her injuries; as the manhunt for the killer begins, a pattern of toxicity exposes a violent past and more than one murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The tragic suicide of a grandfather seems to be an open-and-shut case until detectives in Morrisdale, Pa., receive a message from beyond the grave that suggests the deceased may not have died by his own hand.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a former Penn State professor mysteriously goes missing, police uncover clues to his untimely demise; the investigation leads to a grisly crime scene and two unlikely culprits, who would stop at nothing to get rid of him.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A young woman seeks refuge at the home of a Wisconsin farmer, claiming she just escaped from a violent assault; when investigators arrive at the crime scene, they make a discovery that leads them to expose a deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A loving father and veteran suddenly vanishes in coastal South Carolina; investigators question those close to him and find the unraveling threads of a love triangle; when his body surfaces in a nearby river, a crime of passion comes to light.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A family of rodeo queens is thrown into turmoil when their patriarch disappears from his Dalhart, Texas ranch; investigators search for the missing father, as they expose family secrets that may lead to a murder plot.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The sister of a successful Hollywood producer is found dead in the garage of a home they share; with conflicting clues at the scene, authorities are left to determine if the cause of death is a tragic accident, suicide or a malicious plan.

programme.desc: Now that the Alola Pokémon League is over, it’s time for the Pokémon School class to make plans for their upcoming vacation!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: With their big vacation on the horizon, our heroes are setting some life-changing plans into motion!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: The Pokémon School class is putting on a play with more twists and turns than they could ever expect!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash por fin llega al Gimnasio Azalea, pero Cyndaquil no tiene la energía para derrotar al Líder de Gimnasio. Conforme la batalla se enciende, Ash debe esforzarse al máximo para derrotar al poderoso Pokémon tipo Insecto.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un Entrenador joven y poco experimentado asustó a su propio Farfetch'd. Nuestros héroes están felices de ayudarlo, pero tendrán que hallarlo antes que el Equipo Rocket.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En un festival anual de intercambio Pokémon, un joven Entrenador busca un buen cambio por su Wobbuffet. El trío del Equipo Rocket también busca oportunidades, pero ambos grupos de Entrenadores obtienen más de lo que pidieron.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una inesperada competencia de apaga incendios Pokémon reúne a nuestros héroes con algunos viejos amigos, el escuadrón Squirtle! pero necesitan desesperadamente a un líder, así que Ash y Squirtle se reintegran a sus filas.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran con una guardería para Wooper y una emergencia requiere del maestro, nuestros héroes van al rescate. Pero, como siempre, el Equipo Rocket está a la vuelta de la esquina, y no trama nada bueno…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: En su camino hacia ciudad Caña Dorada, nuestros héroes se ven obligados a atravesar un túnel resguardado por un furioso Onix. Para hacer las cosas más difíciles, el equipo Rocket, Snubbull y Jigglypuff llegan de visita…

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Siguiendo una serie de misteriosos robos, nuestros héroes descubren a unos Houndour luchando por sobrevivir en la naturaleza. Para ayudar a estos Pokémon ladrones a reformarse, Ash y sus amigos tendrán que ganarse su confianza.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre Ash y Misty se reaviva cuando ambos tratan de capturar a Totodile a la vez. Como no saben cuál Pokébola lo capturó, tendrán una batalla para decidir quién será el nuevo Entrenador de Totodile.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Cuando Ash oye de un entrenador virtualmente invencible, quiere ir a retarlo. Pero el Vulpix de Brock y el Cyndaquil de Ash reciben una paliza de su Skarmory, ¡a pesar de su ventaja de tipo! ¿Cómo logrará Ash derrotarlo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: El Totodile de Ash se enamora de un Azumarill, que es la artista estrella de un circo Pokémon. Cuando el Equipo Rocket llega a robar el espectáculo, el corazón de Azumarill no será la única cosa que Totodile deba ganar.

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Ash tiene la vista puesta en un raro Noctowl de un color inusual, pero este astuto Pokémon usa repetidamente Hipnosis para engañarlo. ¿Podrá Ash capturar a este Noctowl dormilón?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Un ataque sorpresa de un grupo de Ursaring hace que nuestros héroes y el Equipo Rocket busquen refugio. En el caos, los grupos se separan, y las poco entusiasmadas parejas tienen que trabajar juntas. Pero, ¿por cuánto tiempo?

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Tras una advertencia en el bosque sobre un travieso Pokémon tipo Fantasma, nuestros héroes llegan a un pueblo donde todos usan tipos Psíquico para repelerlos. Pronto llegan temibles noticias: ¡un Gengar gigante anda suelto!

programme.title: Pokémon: Los campeones de la Liga Johto
programme.desc: Una repentina moda en la adivinación Pokémon resulta ser un plan para robar a los Pokémon de los Entrenadores locales. Pero esta vez Jessie, James y Meowth no son los responsables. ¿Quiénes son estos villanos?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Ash Ketchum, un niño de diez años de Pueblo Paleta, finalmente tiene la edad para recibir a su primer Pokémon! Sin embargo, se queda dormido y el único Pokémon restante en el laboratorio del profesor Oak es un terco Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash corre hacia Ciudad Viridian con su herido Pikachu, ahí se encuentra con Jessie, James, y Meowth del Equipo Rocket, así como con Misty, quien está molesta porque Ash descompuso su bicicleta.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Ash descubre y atrapa a su primer Pokémon! Aunque está emocionada, Misty siente repugnancia por su nuevo amigo Pokémon tipo insecto.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡Un furioso enjambre de Beedrill ataca a Ash y a Samurái a la mitad de un duelo de Metapod! Ash escapa, dejando atrás a su Metapod, quien está molesto con él por abandonarlo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash desafía al líder de gimnasio de Ciudad Plateada, Brock, pero ni siquiera Pikachu tiene oportunidad contra los Pokémon tipo roca de Brock. Con la ayuda del misterioso Flint, Ash entrenará duro antes de la revancha.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Un científico guía a Ash y a sus a amigos a las profundidades de Mr. Moon para encontrar la famosa piedra lunar, la cual se dice tiene el poder de incrementar el poder de los Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash busca la Medalla Cascada en Ciudad Celeste, pero por alguna razón, Misty no quiere acompañarlo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de ganar su segunda medalla, Ash parte triunfal hacia Ciudad Carmín. En el camino escucha acerca de AJ, un entrenador a punto de conseguir 100 victorias seguidas. ¡Lleno de confianza, Ash reta a este temible entrenador!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash conoce a algunos estudiantes, quienes molestan a su compañero Joe. Joe insiste en que se necesita un trato duro para que él sea lo suficientemente fuerte para graduarse. Ash no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Completamente perdidos, nuestros héroes llegan a un pueblo que no aparece en su mapa. Este tranquilo lugar está habitado por Pokémon que han sido heridos en batalla o abandonados por sus entrenadores.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Conforme nuestros héroes se acercan a Ciudad Carmín, se encuentran con un Charmander herido, sentado sobre una piedra en el paso de una montaña. Más tarde descubren por qué está esperando ahí.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos caminan por un sendero y caen en un hoyo cavado por un grupo de traviesos Squirtle. ¿Por qué el Escuadrón Squirtle es una amenaza para la gente del lugar?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: El grupo conoce a Bill, un investigador Pokémon que está esperando en su faro la llegada de un Pokémon único en su tipo, nunca antes visto por los humanos. ¿Acaso existirá un Pokémon así?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ansioso por ganar una medalla, Ash reta al Lt. Surge. Pikachu entra sin ganas a la batalla, donde descubre que su oponente es un Raichu, un feroz Pokémon con un tremendo poder eléctrico, ¡y la forma evolucionada de Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos abordan el crucero St. Anne gracias a los boletos proporcionados por Jessie y James disfrazados. Su más reciente plan es atraer entrenadores Pokémon hacia el barco para robar sus Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Una tormenta obliga a todos, excepto al Equipo Rocket y a nuestros héroes, a abandonar el zozobrante St. Anne. Ash, Brock y Misty deben hacer equipo con sus antiguos enemigos para sobrevivir esta bochornosa situación.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Mientras nuestros héroes y el Equipo Rocket sobreviven contra toda posibilidad al hundimiento del St. Anne, se ven arrastrados a otra peligrosa situación cuando son atacados por el Pokémon Gyarados.

programme.desc: Data tries to comprehend the complex emotions between O'Brien and Keiko, who are about to be married.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The ship is surrounded by creatures whose presence accelerates Kes' reproductive process and threatens Voyager's key operating systems.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Ensign Harry Kim awakens on Earth, where he's shocked to learn there's no record of his assignment on Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A strange spatial distortion afflicts the ship and has the entire crew literally lost on their own ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix and Paris must put aside their romantic rivalry over Kes after they crash-land on a toxic planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A mysterious force puts the crew in a delusional state that causes their most deeply buried thoughts and desires to surface.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay is stranded on a planet inhabited by natives with ties to his ancestors.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kes makes contact with Ocampa spacefarers and the female Caretaker, who may have the power to send the crew home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The theft of a transporter module by Kazon forces thrusts Chakotay into an explosive confrontation with his traitorous former lover Seska.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway must escape from a city under siege by the Mokra, a brutal regime determined to crush the growing resistance movement against it.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After Torres reactivates a humanoid robot, she's drawn into a war between robotic enemies.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Hoping to strengthen Voyager's strategic position in the quadrant, Janeway reluctantly seeks an alliance with the Kazon.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Paris makes history by becoming the first person to cross the transwarp threshold, but could pay for the achievement with his life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Unable to come up with a logical motive for a shipboard murder, Tuvok performs a mind-meld with the perpetrator that brings out Tuvok's "killer instinct."

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Torres races against time to stop a deadly self-guided missile on a collision course with disaster.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Returning the settlers to their home planet Novus, the Destiny crew discover the planet has been abandoned and is on the verge of seismic destruction. While pouring through an underground archive, the crew learns of the true origins of Novus.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Stargate Command is baffled by the arrival of several virtually identical SG-1 teams and must find a way to return them to their respective universes before calamity occurs. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel fears the worst when Teal'c mysteriously disappears after investigating corruption. His fears are confirmed when he finds that Jaffa have been kidnapped and brainwashed. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 sets out to destroy a massive and deadly weapon invented by their increasingly powerful foe, the Ori. If not, the Caledonian Federation and its people will be destroyed. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Hank Landry (Beau Bridges) and the rest of the Stargate team plan an offensive when they learn that the Goa'uld Ba'al is in the United States and is once again regaining power. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A crop of genetically engineered insects turns deadly, forcing the SG-1 team to destroy them before they and the visiting international diplomats becoming their next victims. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: While Teal'c sets off to investigate foul play on a Jaffa planet, Mitchell, Carter and Daniel become out of phase while experimenting with a powerful and ancient device. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Vala returns to Stargate Command to deliver startling news: the Ori have been building military forces, and plan to launch crusades against their dissidents in the near future. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As the Ori's all out assault. looms closer, lieutenant Colonel Cameron Mitchell and Daniel Jackson race to locate a device that will obliterate the evil enemy once and for all. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As their battle with the Ori continues, the team struggles to reunite and formulate a plan to defeat their enemy. Vala (Claudia Black), still aboard an Ori ship, watches as her newly born child quickly ages and is molded to lead the Ori army.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a mission to find a weapon that will defeat their powerful foe, the team finds a planet whose inhabitants were killed by a mysterious illness, and unwittingly fall victim to the illness themselves. Starring Ben Browder and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 travels to the Pegasus Galaxy and the city of Atlantis in hopes to find a clue to a weapon that can destroy the Ori. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, Christopher Judge, Claudia Black, Beau Bridges, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team makes a pact with an old enemy to fight their common foe, and the results are disastrous. Starring Ben Browder as Lt. Colonel Cameron Mitchell, Christopher Judge as Teal'c, and Amanda Tapping as Lt. Colonel Samantha Carter.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay (David Hewlett) volunteers to be the first to try Beckett's (Paul McGillion) newest ATA gene therapy. But things go wrong when the device cannot be removed, and is stopping Dr. McKay from being able to eat or drink and endangering his life.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Canyon Country, an exceptionally large estate is sold off and Dave tries to prove there are no wise young men; Dusty uses obsolete technology to his advantage; Brandi sets herself a place at the table.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene and Casey strike liquid gold with a wine tasting kit and some valuable vintage bottles; it's fiesta time for Brandi who keeps the drinks flowing with her new margarita machine.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell "The Gambler" Sheets hits the jackpot with lockers loaded wall-to-wall with sports collectibles; from vintage jerseys and signed balls to rare memorabilia fit for a Hall of Fame, every box he opens is a slam dunk, touchdown, and home run.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders shift into gear as they uncover wheels, parts and pedal-powered gold in a junk-filled joyride of transportation treasures.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Barry's Best Buys
programme.desc: Revisiting the numerous instances of bad judgment and self-sabotage that ruined Barry Weiss' efforts to win a storage locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Barry's Best Buys
programme.desc: Looking back at treasure hunter Barry Weiss' most memorable sidekicks, from the clairvoyant, to the hairy, to Kenny.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy takes on a supervisory role in Stanton, and it leads him to a bit of Slavic success; Brandi tries to help Danielle outfit her new apartment; Lisa gambles on a painting.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars: Best Bidding Wars
programme.desc: Renee and Casey defend their home turf; the buyers fight for some rocking memorabilia; Ivy and Mary team up in Koreatown; Darrell and Brandon bring some shenanigans to a bidding war; an auction attracts an army of buyers.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: A betrayal destroys peace in Chicago, and Torrio and Capone seek revenge against the Irish gangs. The "Beer Wars" make Capone Chicago's top gangster.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Capone uses the St. Valentine's Day Massacre to assert his power over his enemies. President Hoover takes notice, and Eliot Ness takes on Capone.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Al Capone outwits Eliot Ness, but Capone's criminal empire remains in jeopardy when the IRS plants an undercover agent in his gang.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: With Capone in jail, Frank Nitti, Paul Ricca, and Joe Accardo take over. A Hollywood scandal presents Sam Giancana with a chance to prove himself.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo sets his sights on Las Vegas, but when Sam Giancana incurs the wrath of young attorney Robert F. Kennedy, The Outfit is threatened.

programme.title: The Making of the Mob
programme.desc: Joe Accardo and Sam Giancana have a falling out, and the fate of the Outfit rests on the outcome. Joe Accardo cleans up loose ends before retiring.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Visit the creative team behind Breaking Bad. Join Emmy-winner Bryan Cranston, Vince Gilligan and the entire writing team as they divulge how they created the stories for a show that was recently named one of the best written TV series of all time.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Pay a visit to the team behind Parks & Recreation, the show that skewers small-town politics and features one of America's most energetic, comic talents. Amy Poehler and the writers delve into what it's like to be funny for a living.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of Dexter, the show about a serial killer with a strict moral code. Now in its 8th and final season, get rare insights from actor Michael C. Hall and show runner, Scott Buck, and the team who brought Dexter Morgan to life.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go inside New Girl, the cult comedy about an adorkable girl and her three male roommates trying to make their way in the big city. Creator Liz Meriwether, actor Jake Johnson and the writing team share juicy details of their off-beat writer's room.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Join the co-creators of Game of Thrones, the hit HBO series, as they open up in a rare and candid behind-the-scenes look. In a revealing conversation, find out how Game of Thrones became the most epic television series of all time.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go behind the curtain of one of the scariest and most unique TV series, American Horror Story, with creators Ryan Murphy & Brad Falchuck. See these creative minds spill the secrets of their success behind "one of the greatest TV dramas ever created."

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash takes viewers behind the scandals of Scandal with creator and showrunner Shonda Rhimes, star Kerry Washington and writers Mark Wilding, Matt Byrne, Jenna Bans and Heather Mitchell as they dish about one of tv's most provocative shows.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash explores the world of comic book adaptations for TV with "The Walking Dead" Creator Robert Kirkman and "Smallville" Creators Al Gough and Miles Millar. Pop culture expert Blair Butler and TV Guide's Michael Schneider join the chat.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go inside the show that exposes our nation's (fictitious) dirty underbelly. "House of Cards" Showrunner Beau Willimon, star Molly Parker, writer Laura Eason and Co-Executive Producer John Mankiewicz reveal the creative process behind the hit series.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Host Jim Rash gets a behind-the-scenes look at the groundbreaking television series "Sons of Anarchy". Creator Kurt Sutter, star Katey Sagal and Executive Producers Charles Murray and Mike Daniels reveal the inner workings behind FX's biggest hit.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Jim Rash joins Creators Robert and Michelle King, star Julianna Margulies and Executive Producer Ted Humphrey to discuss "The Good Wife." From the hottest sex scenes to celebrity guests, get an exclusive glimpse into the creative process.

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Showrunners I. Marlene King, Oliver Goldstick and Joseph Dougherty along with stars Shay Mitchell and Sasha Pieterse spill the dirt (including some spoilers) on the "Pretty Little Liars" creative process with never-before-told secrets from the set.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: An accident at sea cripples a Royal Navy expedition 200 miles from finding the Northwest Passage, forcing its captains to make a dire choice.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: After a long winter trapped in the ice, scouting parties are sent out in search of open water. One of the teams makes a frightening discovery.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry gets an urgent plea to return to Oz, she finds that there’s an environmental disaster in the works.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When a comedy of errors causes Orange, Plum and Cherry to arrive late to their campout, they start off their annual tradition of telling tall-tales around the campfire.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: A problem in the sparkleberry juice system that powers the entire town results in a repair crew of Berrykins invading the town with jackhammers.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: A problem in the sparkleberry juice system that powers the town keeps the girls from doing their work—to the frustration of Cherry Jam, who is struggling to write a song.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Orange's store is overflowing with Berrykin Bloom's new line of Berry Bitty Fruits & Veggies. Confident she can tackle any challenge, Orange tries to deal with everything herself.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum disregards Strawberry’s rule to sign up for use of the café, and is forced to reschedule a big dance recital. She holds a grudge and starts instigating wacky, nonsensical rules to prove rules are silly.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When a new game comes to Berry Bitty City, it starts to encroach on the other activities of the community. It falls to Orange to figure out how to give everyone in town their fair share of access to the public spaces.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Terribly worried when her beloved pets don't return home, Strawberry puts on a brave face so as not to worry her friends as they all search for the pets.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony hurts her leg and must stay in bed instead of heading off for a grand adventure.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykin Bloom's braggart cousin, Berrykin Bertram, has won the hot sauce competition at the local county fair year after year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Against Strawberry’s advice, Orange adopts a baby fish and discovers she has her hands full when it turns out to be not a fish, but a tadpole-on-its-way-to-being-a-frog!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much-needed vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon orders a new high-tech machine to do salon services faster, then worries that she is no longer needed in the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When both Raspberry and Berrykin Bruce plan spring-themed events for the same location, Strawberry helps them work out a compromise—they combine their efforts to create a spring fashion show around a water show.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum rallies her friends to be secret 'shoemaker’s elves' for Raspberry and help her finish a dress, but things comically get out of hand.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: After an accidental wager with Purple Pieman, Strawberry sets off to prove that she can go around the world in 80 days.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the girls learn their tropical island vacation is cancelled due to weather, Orange decides to build an exact replica of the resort at home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the 'Berry Deep Dark Forest.'

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Apple Dumplin’ wants to help Strawberry & her Friends with the baking. But Dumplin’s just a little too little to be much help. In fact, she ends up making a pretty big mess of things.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz is so determined to win the Nearly Once-A-Yearly Strawberryland Games.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: A packaging mix-up at the seed company results in Blueberry planting popcorn instead of daisies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry’s cat Custard is shown to live a pampered, adored existence in Strawberry’s house. But Custard’s dream set-up is shattered by the sudden arrival of a rambunctious stray puppy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of L. Frank Baum’s classic 'Wonderful Wizard of Oz' – told from Pupcake’s point of view.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.desc: With the Fire Nation on the brink of global domination, a young girl and her brother discover a 12-year old Airbender who reveals himself as the Avatar. Will this irresponsible kid accept his destiny in time to save the world?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When our gang regroups at the Western Air temple, they find someone there they weren’t expecting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When it comes time for Zuko to teach Aang Firebending, it turns out Aang is not the only one who needs a lesson. The two set out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. But what will she do when she finds him?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids see a play about themselves and all their past adventures. But they aren’t happy with the production.
